hero.headline: Locked Out? We're *Already on the Way*
hero.subheadline: No games, no gouging — just fast locksmith service when Springfield needs it most.

services_section.label: WHAT WE UNLOCK
services_section.heading: Every Lock, Every Door, Every Time
services_section.subheading: From house keys to car fobs — we handle it all

services.title: Emergency Lockouts
services.description: Car, home, or office — we get you back in fast. No damage, no drama.

services.title: Lock Installation
services.description: New deadbolts, smart locks, and security upgrades that actually work.

services.title: Key Cutting & Duplication
services.description: House keys, car keys, specialty keys — cut right the first time.

services.title: Lock Repair & Rekey
services.description: Fix sticky locks or rekey after moving. Quick turnaround guaranteed.

about.heading: Springfield's Go-To Locksmith
about.body: We're the Springfield locksmith team that shows up when we say we will. Real techs, real tools, upfront pricing.

cta.heading: Locked Out? We're Ready
cta.body: Don't wait around — get back inside fast with Springfield's trusted locksmith team.
